repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The three softplus-specific entries (821abf6f, f752d77d, 2172b69c) directly match the current operator and cover common errors: ValueError from missing txt bundle blocks and CMake/opbuild failures. Two additional activation entries (62dfe59d for hardsigmoid and d7872c76 for min_gpt_new_gelu) reinforce the same txt-bundle pattern, which is a frequent issue across activation ops. All are tier A/B and target the same toolchain stages and error classes, providing diverse, complementary guidance for a no_tool softplus repair.
